creator: stephen@missouri.edu
text:
I maintain several ports.  My email address has changed from stephen@math.missouri.edu to stephen@missouri.edu.  In a few years time, it is likely that the old email address will cease to work.

I am also maintainer of science/gromacs, but I expect not to be very soon.

Fix: 

Do a
sed s/stephen@math.missouri.edu/stephen@missouri.edu/
on the appropriate files.

(If the committer likes, I could generate a script, or a diff file to do this.  Whatever makes their job easier.  The reason I do not do this now is because I don't know how this would interact with the CVS tags that come at the beginning of the files.)
